notes: Add or remove sources anytime. The scout skill reads this file dynamically each run.

web_sources.name: United Theatre — Coming Soon
web_sources.prompt: Extract all upcoming events with dates, times, venue (United Theatre or Knickerbocker), descriptions, and ticket prices. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: United Theatre — Now Playing
web_sources.prompt: Extract all currently playing films and events with showtimes, descriptions, and durations. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: Ocean Mist — Events
web_sources.prompt: Extract all upcoming live music events and special events with dates, times, performer names, cover charges, and any details. Return as a structured list.
web_sources.notes: Main page may not render events. Try /live-music-and-events-1/ (Box Office) as fallback.

web_sources.name: Ocean Mist — Box Office (fallback)
web_sources.prompt: Extract all upcoming events with dates, times, performer names, ticket prices, and details.

web_sources.prompt: Extract all events with dates, times, locations, towns, descriptions, and ticket prices. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: Eventbrite — South Kingstown This Weekend
web_sources.prompt: Extract all events with dates, times, locations, towns, descriptions, and ticket prices. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: Narragansett Chamber — Event Calendar
web_sources.prompt: Extract all upcoming events with dates, times, locations, and descriptions. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: South County Tourism — Events
web_sources.prompt: Extract all listed events with dates, times, locations, towns, and descriptions. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: Courthouse Center for the Arts
web_sources.prompt: Extract all upcoming performances, exhibits, and events with dates, times, and descriptions. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: Ocean Chamber (Westerly) — Events
web_sources.prompt: Extract all upcoming events with dates, times, locations, and descriptions. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: GoProvidence — Events
web_sources.prompt: Extract notable upcoming events this week — concerts, festivals, major restaurant openings, cultural events. Only include events that would be worth a 30-45 minute drive from South County. Return as a structured list.

web_sources.name: Visit Rhode Island — Events
web_sources.prompt: Extract events happening in South County / Washington County Rhode Island this week with dates, times, locations, and descriptions. Return as a structured list.

search_queries: South County Rhode Island events this week
Westerly Rhode Island events this weekend
Narragansett Rhode Island events this weekend
Wakefield South Kingstown RI events this week
East Greenwich Rhode Island events this week
